_note: Seeded from docs/authority-kb-visakhapatnam-v0.1.md. verified=true only where the research marked ✅ with a source. verified=false entries are quarantined from auto-routing (sacred contract #2). Names are designations, never persons.

authorities.name: GVMC Engineering Department (zonal)
authorities.sourceNote: GVMC executive structure: Municipal Commissioner (IAS), zonal commissioners (zones 8→10 per Deccan Chronicle), engineering dept — corroborated by eGov/CEPT field study (docs/validation-report-v1.0.md)

authorities.name: GVMC Public Health & Sanitation Department (zonal)
authorities.sourceNote: eGov/CEPT field study: GVMC PGR departments incl. Public Health & Sanitation; top categories garbage removal, drain desilting, water stagnation

authorities.name: GVMC Water Supply Department
authorities.sourceNote: GVMC official site water supply wing

authorities.name: GVMC Town Planning Department
authorities.sourceNote: eGov/CEPT field study lists Town Planning among GVMC PGR departments

authorities.name: Ward Secretariat (per-ward, ~650 across GVMC)
authorities.sourceNote: Field study: ~650 ward secretariats in Visakhapatnam, 1 per 1000-1200 households, 10 functionaries; welfare/entitlement first contact. PERSONAL categories route here privately.

authorities.name: Tahsildar (mandal revenue office)
authorities.sourceNote: District revenue hierarchy: Collector → RDO (Visakhapatnam & Bheemunipatnam divisions) → Tahsildar per mandal. 2022 reorganization verified.

authorities.name: APEPDCL section office (Eastern Power Distribution Co.)
authorities.sourceNote: APEPDCL HQ Visakhapatnam; internal escalation designations not yet field-verified (docs/authority-kb §6 marks ⚠️)

authorities.name: District Educational Officer (DEO), Visakhapatnam
authorities.sourceNote: Standard AP education hierarchy; specific office contact not yet field-verified (⚠️ in KB) — routes via human review

authorities.name: District Medical & Health Officer (DMHO), Visakhapatnam
authorities.sourceNote: Standard AP health hierarchy; not yet field-verified (⚠️) — human review routing

authorities.name: MP, Visakhapatnam Lok Sabha (MPLADS recommending authority)
authorities.sourceNote: MPLADS 2023 guidelines: ₹5cr/yr, works recommended by MP, District Authority sanctions (45-day rejection notice / 75-day sanction clocks). MP: Sribharat Mathukumili (2024, verified via IndiaVotes/Wikipedia).

authorities.name: CPGRAMS forwarding (central agencies: Port, Railways, Steel Plant, NHAI)
authorities.sourceNote: Central-subject problems route as CPGRAMS filing packs (docs/functional-requirements FR-RTE-04); used when org jurisdiction is central
